title: Cruise Line Stocks Make Huge Gains As Demand Soars
text: Carnival and Royal Caribbean have seen huge uplifts to their share prices in 2023 and have the earnings reports to back up the buoyancy.

title: 5 Top Picks on Increasing Consumer Confidence in June
text: We have narrowed our search to five consumer-centric stocks with strong upside potential for the rest of 2023. These are: CMG, MAR, RCL, IHG, SHAK.

title: 5 Stocks With Relative Price Strength Tailwinds at Their Back
text: RCL, ALGT, AFYA, CASY and MTW are five stocks with explosive relative price strength.

title: 2 Cruise Stocks Boosting the S&P 500 Rally in 1H 2023
text: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) and Carnival (CCL), well-known for ferrying people across the globe, are two of the best-performing stocks listed on the S&P 500 so far this year.

title: 5 Stocks to Buy as Consumer Confidence Makes Solid Rebound
text: Discretionary stocks like Marriott International (MAR), Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL), Hilton Grand Vacations (HGV), Lifetime Brands (LCUT) and Cinemark Holdings (CNK) are likely to benefit from soaring consumer confidence.

title: 4 Big Gainers on Soaring Consumer Confidence
text: As consumer confidence in June touches the highest level since January 2002, stocks such as Hilton Grand Vacations (HGV), Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL), Cinemark (CNK) and OneSpaWorld (OSW) are well-poised to gain.

title: Forget AI and self-driving cars - 2 of the S&P 500's 5 best-performing stocks this year are cruise lines
text: Royal Caribbean and Carnival are among the five best-performing stocks in the S&P 500 this year. The other three are tech titans: Nvidia, Tesla, and Meta Platforms.

title: 4 Stocks to Buy on Americans' Travel Plan Despite Rising Prices
text: Americans are planning to travel more than they did in 2022 and are willing to shell out more, benefiting stocks like Marriott International (MAR), InterContinental Hotels Group (IHG), Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) and Alaska Air (ALK).

title: A Perfect and Endless Summer: Celebrity Cruises® Will Be Island Hopping Like Never Before With the Introduction of a New Caribbean Program Including the First Ever Stops to Perfect Day at CocoCay
text: For the first time ever, Celebrity guests will be able to visit Perfect Day at CocoCay Celebrity's newest Edge Series ship, BeyondSM, will now be available year-round from South Florida Travelers will be able to getaway every weekend on Celebrity Reflection's new three and four-night sailings MIAMI , June 27, 2023 /PRNewswire / --  Celebrity Cruises , the award-winning premium cruise line with a global fleet of 16 resorts at sea that take guests to more than 300 destinations around the world across all seven continents, is thrilled to announce a revamped Caribbean program for the Summer 2024 season. Starting next April, sun chasers, beach lovers and relaxation seekers, will all be able to enjoy the Caribbean like never before on board two award-winning ships, Celebrity Beyond SM  and Celebrity Reflection ® , as they begin to call the tropics home.

title: Betting Against the Market: 3 Stocks at Risk as Short Bets Reach a One-Year High
text: The stock market has been surging lately. And, in conjunction, stocks at risk of short selling are also rising as traders look to take advantage of overpriced securities.

title: Why Are Cruise Stocks CCL, NCLH, RCL Down Today?
text: Though setting sail on a cruise often represents an excellent bang for the buck, investors felt otherwise, sending shares of Carnival (NYSE: CCL ) downward Monday. Although the company posted an earnings beat for its fiscal second quarter, it continues to lose money (though losses have been mitigated since the Covid-19 pandemic).

title: Cruise Industry Riding on High Demand: 3 Stocks to Benefit
text: The cruise industry rides on pent up demand, fleet-expansion efforts and digital performance marketing strategies. CCL, RCL and NCLH have gained in the past year.

title: Time's Ticking: Dump These 3 Overvalued Blue-Chip Stocks
text: The market has had a good first half this year. All three major indices are in the green, with the tech-laden Nasdaq up 30% and the S&P 500 index having gained 14%.

title: Factors That Emphasize Royal Caribbean's (RCL) Solid Prospects
text: Royal Caribbean (RCL) benefits from robust booking trends, addition of new ships and focus on Trifecta Program.

title: INTRODUCING THE WORLD'S BIGGEST WEEKEND: ROYAL CARIBBEAN'S UTOPIA OF THE SEAS IS REVEALED
text: The New Oasis Class Ship is the First of Its Kind to Debut With 3-night Weekend and 4-night Weekday Getaways, With More Ways to Play, Dine and Celebrate All in One Trip MIAMI , June 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Next summer, vacationers can celebrate the weekend in the biggest way ever. Royal Caribbean International has revealed the ultimate 3-night weekend and 4-night weekday getaway,  Utopia of the Seas.

title: Can Cruise Line Stocks Stay Hot This Summer?
text: Carnival, Royal Caribbean, and Norwegian Cruise Line are among the market's biggest gainers in the second quarter. Analyst moves are encouraging, as booking and pricing trends keep improving.

title: Carnival guidance to be focus of 2Q earnings as Royal Caribbean raises outlook
text: Carnival Corp's guidance will be the focus of investor attention when the cruise ship operator reports its second-quarter financial results on Monday, June 26, 2023, after its rival Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) recently raised its own outlook, according to analysts at UBS. The analysts pointed out that RCL raised its 2023 financial year yield by 400 basis points to 6.25% to 7.25% yield growth compared to 2019.

title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy as Fed Keeps Interest Rate Unaltered
text: Consumer discretionary stocks like OneSpaWorld Holdings (OSW), Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL), Cinemark Holdings (CNK) and Lifetime Brands (LCUT) are likely to benefit as a halt in interest rate hike will allow people to spend more freely.

title: Cruise Stocks Climb Amid Strong Booking Demand, Analyst Upgrades
text: Momentum has begun to swarm in cruise stocks, as pent-up demand following the pandemic has now evolved into sustainable growth. Wall Street analysts have recently turned bullish on the sector, with one stock in particular benefitting from a flurry of upgrades.

title: IT'S NOT SO LONELY AT THE TOP: CELEBRITY CRUISES REVEALS DETAILS FOR ITS UPCOMING SHIP - CELEBRITY ASCENT
text: The fourth vessel in the brand's award-winning Edge® Series, AscentSM will  be the newest ship out of South Florida upon its November 2023 debut MIAMI , June 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Celebrity Cruises unveils for the very first time details about what travelers can experience on board the brand's newest resort at sea, Celebrity Ascent, once it launches this November. As one of the most awarded premium cruise lines, with the first ships to ever receive the coveted Forbes Travel Guide Star Rating, Celebrity Cruises is once again making waves with the arrival of its fourth Edge Series ship.

title: Carnival leads gains in cruise stocks as analysts eye strong travel demand
text: Shares of Carnival Corp and Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd jumped on Monday, and were among the top S&P 500 performers, as analysts anticipate continuing growth in travel demand from customers.

title: Markets Gain Amid Anticipation of a Fed Rate Hike Pause
text: U.S. equities were up at midday on Monday, June 12, 2023 amid optimism the Fed will pause its rate hike cycle.

title: Why Are Cruise Stocks CCL, RCL, NCLH Up Today?
text: Cruise stocks are on the rise Monday as investors react to a positive note to clients from JPMorgan analysts. That note has to do with Carnival (NYSE: CCL ) and its progress bouncing back from the Covid-19 lockdowns that left many cruise companies suffering.

title: 3 Travel Stocks to Avoid
text: Subscribers to  Chart of the Week  received this commentary on Sunday, June 4.

title: S&P 500 ETF Enters Bull Market: 5 Best Stocks YTD
text: The S&P 500 entered a new bull market, ending the longest bear streak since the 1940s.

title: Royal Caribbean Group Extends Collaboration to Capture Critical Ocean Conservation Data Onboard Ships
text: OceanScope program renewal – announced on World Oceans Day – builds on decades-long public-private collaboration with the University of Miami, NASA, and NOAA to address ocean health issues. MIAMI , June 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) Strengthening a decades-long commitment to ocean conservation and environmental research efforts, Royal Caribbean Group today announced a four-year extension of its investment in OceanScope, an open-source data program that provides scientists with critical information to study climate and ocean conservation.

title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP ANNOUNCES GROUND-BREAKING BIOFUEL TESTING, ACCELERATING THE INDUSTRY'S ENERGY TRANSITION
text: Celebrity Cruises' Celebrity Apex and Royal Caribbean International's Symphony of the Seas will be at the forefront of alternative fuel use thanks to extended sustainable biofuel tests this summer in Europe MIAMI , June 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- This summer, Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) will set a new industry milestone in alternative fuel use when Celebrity Cruises' Celebrity Apex and Royal Caribbean International's Symphony of the Seas, set sail in Europe using sustainable biofuel to meet part of the ships' fuel needs. The landmark test will contribute critical data and research on the fuel's capabilities and supply chain infrastructure needed to further the industry's alternative fuel ambitions.

title: Royal Caribbean Reports "Strong Revenue Outlook." Time to Buy the Stock?
text: Royal Caribbean's first-quarter results exceeded expectations. The company anticipates record adjusted EBITDA for full-year 2023.

title: Millennials' Top Stock Is Up 192% — And You've Never Heard Of It
text: Millennials are loaded up with the same big-cap S&P 500 stocks as everyone else. But their biggest winning stock is much more obscure.
